final:
// // This module implements a 3-input multiplexer with a 2-bit selector. Output is x1 when selector is 00, x2 when selector is 01, and x3 when selector is 10. Selector value 11 is undefined.
module top_module(input x1,input x2,input x3,input [1:0]signal,output OUTPUT);assign OUTPUT = (~signal[0] & ~signal[1] & x1)|(signal[0] & ~signal[1] & x2)|(~signal[0] & signal[1] & x3);endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 3-input multiplexer with a 2-bit selector. Output is x1 when selector is 00, x2 when selector is 01, and x3 when selector is 10. Selector value 11 is undefined.
